title: primula yunnanensis subsp. fragilis
intro: Primula yunnanensis subsp. fragilis, also known as the Yunnan fragrant primrose or Yunnan primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, native to the mountainous regions of China and India. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Primula yunnanensis subsp. fragilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
